idea-plugin.name: Windows Themes
idea-plugin.description:
Classic Windows UI themes for JetBrains IDEs.

Included Themes

  • Windows 95 – Flat gray Windows 95/98 look
  • Windows ME – Slightly warmer Windows 2000/ME look
  • Windows XP

Getting Started

  1. Go to Settings → Appearance & Behavior → Appearance
  2. Select Windows 95, Windows ME, or Windows XP from the Theme dropdown
  3. Click OK

Keywords

Windows XP, Windows 95, Windows 98, Windows ME, Windows 2000, Windows NT, Windows Classic, Theme, Color Scheme, Light Theme
